arts.ttl: Barcelona ready to rival Liverpool for right-back target
arts.sum: Barcelona are ready to rival Liverpool in the race to sign Rayo Vallecano right-back Andrei Ratiu this summer. Liverpool are understood to have shortlisted Ratiu as a potential replacement for Trent Alexander-Arnold. The latter is out of contract at Anfield in the summer and expected to sign for Real Madrid on a free transfer. Arne […] The post Barcelona ready to rival Liverpool for right-back target first appeared on The Football Faithful.
